title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Test left zoom in/out functionality on the third screen (charge case outside) by clicking the left circle button to zoom in and out.
steps: Click left circle button to zoom in (new text appears)
Click left circle button again to zoom out to original screen showing charge case outside
expected: Zoom in shows new text; zoom out returns to original screen showing charge case outside.
